username.title: Username
username.description: Your username in SERVICE_NAME that will be used to authorize the component

#password.title: Password
#password.description: Your password in SERVICE_NAME that will be used to authorize the component

client_id.title: Client ID
client_id.description: Client ID used for login to SERVICE_NAME. Obtained using the steps explained here

#client_secret.title: Password
#client_secret.description: Client Secret used for login to SERVICE_NAME. Obtained using the steps explained here

#api_token.title: API Token
#api_token.description: API Key to Authenticate the connection with SERVICE_NAME. Obtained using the steps explained here

endpoint.title: Endpoint
endpoint.description: Endpoint of SERVICE_NAME from which data will be fetched

endpoint-2.title: Endpoints
endpoint-2.description: Endpoints of SERVICE_NAME from which data will be fetched

use_ssh.title: SSH
use_ssh.description: If checked SSH will be used for connection

sync_mode.title: Sync Mode
sync_mode.description: Full Sync downloads all data from the source every run, Incremental Sync downloads data created or updated in a specified time range

date_from.title: Date From
date_from.description: Date from which data is downloaded. Either date in YYYY-MM-DD format or dateparser string i.e. 5 days ago, 1 month ago, yesterday, etc. You can also set this as last run, which will fetch data from the last run of the component.

date_to.title: Date to
date_to.description: Date to which data is downloaded. Either date in YYYY-MM-DD format or dateparser string i.e. 5 days ago, 1 month ago, now, etc.

sync_mode.title: Sync Mode
sync_mode.description: Full Sync downloads all data from the source every run, Incremental Sync downloads data created or updated in a specified time range

date_from.title: Date From
date_from.description: Date from which data is downloaded. Either date in YYYY-MM-DD format or dateparser string i.e. 5 days ago, 1 month ago, yesterday, etc. You can also set this as last run, which will fetch data from the last run of the component.

date_to.title: Date to
date_to.description: Date to which data is downloaded. Either date in YYYY-MM-DD format or dateparser string i.e. 5 days ago, 1 month ago, now, etc.

incremental_field.title: Incremental Field
incremental_field.description: Field/column to be used for incremental fetching

output_table_name.title: Storage Table Name
output_table_name.description: Name of the table stored in Storage.

load_type.title: Load Type
load_type.description: If Full load is used, the destination table will be overwritten every run. If incremental load is used, data will be upserted into the destination table. Tables with a primary key will have rows updated, tables without a primary key will have rows appended.

primary_keys.title: Primary Keys
primary_keys.description: List of primary keys separated by commas e.g. id, other_id. If a primary key is set, updates can be done on the table by selecting incremental loads. The primary key can consist of multiple columns. The primary key of an existing table cannot be changed.

report_type.title: Report type
report_type.description: Select one of the available report types described in the documentation

dimensions.title: Dimensions
dimensions.description: Comma separated list of dimensions to use for the report, find supported dimensions for specific report types in the documentation

metrics.title: Metrics
metrics.description: Comma separated list of metrics to use for the report, find supported dimensions for specific report types in the documentation

date_from.title: Date From
date_from.description: Start date of the report. Either date in YYYY-MM-DD format or dateparser string i.e. 5 days ago, 1 month ago, yesterday, etc.

date_to.title: Date to
date_to.description: End date of the report. Either date in YYYY-MM-DD format or dateparser string i.e. 5 days ago, 1 month ago, yesterday, etc.

endpoint.title: Endpoint
endpoint.description: Use sync action to get a list of available endpoints.

field_names.title: Fields (optional)
field_names.description: List of field names to be downloaded
